strengths: Completed all required phases including suture introduction and target passes
Achieved adequate slit closure within reasonable time frame
Demonstrated consistent extracorporeal knot tying technique
weaknesses: Moderate confidence score suggests some technical inconsistencies
May have gaps in slit closure assessment based on evaluator disagreement
Time performance could be improved for intermediate level

drills.name: Mark-to-mark needle path drill
drills.description: Practice 15 passes through both target marks with deliberate needle placement before any knot tying to improve accuracy.

drills.name: Slit-closure check drill
drills.description: Tighten knots just enough to close the slit without avulsion, then pause to visually inspect closure quality before proceeding.

drills.name: Knot-pusher sequencing drill
drills.description: Practice 12 three-throw extracorporeal sequences with deliberate pusher advancement to build speed and consistency.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your consistent technique into faster, more precise execution. Work on eliminating the technical variations that are affecting your confidence scores.
